items.md: # DON'T LET THIS HAPPEN TO YOU!
items.value: DON'T LET THIS HAPPEN TO YOU!

items.caption: A cartoon showing a man looking through a telescope at a withered plant under a scorching sun, while standing in a puddle of water from a leaking hose.
items.md: ![A cartoon showing a man looking through a telescope at a withered plant under a scorching sun, while standing in a puddle of water from a leaking hose.](CBatAotCB-079_page_1_image_2_v2.jpg)

items.value: Vote YES on Water Bonds, March 11

items.caption: A complex cartoon titled "A Good Laugh Won't Hurt Anyone" depicting a humorous scene at "PALOS VERDES". On the left, a flying machine labeled "THE CONSTITUTION" carries two men past a sign for "HOLLYWOOD RIVIERA". On the right, a group of cavemen-like figures operate a large catapult. In the foreground, a goat in a tuxedo looks at a map, and a man carves "C. BARKS" into a stone.
items.md: ![A complex cartoon titled "A Good Laugh Won't Hurt Anyone" depicting a humorous scene at "PALOS VERDES". On the left, a flying machine labeled "THE CONSTITUTION" carries two men past a sign for "HOLLYWOOD RIVIERA". On the right, a group of cavemen-like figures operate a large catapult. In the foreground, a goat in a tuxedo looks at a map, and a man carves "C. BARKS" into a stone.](CBatAotCB-079_page_1_image_1_v2.jpg)
